name: Taskflow
description: Three-layer autonomous pipeline runner: Platform (state/flow) → SubAgent (knowledge) → Coding CLI (code). Includes dashboard and notification.

dashboardSecret.description: HMAC signing secret for dashboard auth. Token = HMAC-SHA256(secret, 'taskflow-dashboard').

systemPrompt.description: Optional global system prompt layered into extraSystemPrompt for every unit

agent.description: Agent id for unit execution (default: main). Set to a custom agent for role/tool isolation.

model.description: Model override for unit agent sessions (null = use agent default)

timeout.description: Timeout per unit execution in ms (default: 300000 = 5 min)

runtime.description: Default runtime mode for unit execution. Resolution order: taskflow_run override → manifest.runtime → manifest.agent.runtime → plugin config.

dashboardSecret.label: Dashboard Secret
dashboardSecret.help: HMAC signing secret. Token is derived via HMAC-SHA256.
